product.name: Pearl and emerald bracelet
must_keep: bracelet is always worn on the model's left wrist

model.description: adult female model, soft facial features, wavy dark brown hair, cream silk or lace dress

scene.description: sunlit vintage greenhouse room with tall windows, warm golden light, shallow depth of field

segments.motion: medium-speed establishing dolly-in toward the model and left wrist bracelet
continue the same medium-speed dolly-in as the model turns slightly toward camera
smooth face-to-wrist reveal, bracelet remains clear on the left wrist
short elegant pose change, no lingering stillness
camera glides closer from portrait to product detail
slow premium macro movement across pearls, green beads, and gold details
left wrist moves near warm window light while product stays stable and readable
brief natural posture adjustment with consistent camera speed
return to emotional portrait while keeping left wrist bracelet visible
model lifts the left wrist closer to her face in one continuous luxury ad motion
clean final hold with subtle camera settle and product sparkle

video_prompt.base: Realistic high-end jewelry commercial. Keep the same adult female model, same hairstyle, same cream dress, same warm window scene, and the same bracelet on the left wrist. Preserve face size, wrist size, bracelet size, lighting, color, depth of field, and material details from first frame to last frame. No sudden zoom-in, zoom-out, reframing, resizing, crop change, jump cut, flicker, warped hands, distorted fingers, melted face, disappearing bracelet, text, watermark, or logo.

xiaoyunque.note: Upload adjacent frame pairs from the normalized output folder.
